basics.name: Maksym Tretiakov
basics.summary: Quantitative Developer and Ph.D. Candidate in Statistics at LMU Munich (muniq.ai), supervised by Professor David Rugamer.

work.name: Scalable Capital
work.summary: Worked on optimization, risk modeling, and ML models for trading execution.

work.name: LMU Munich (Munich Uncertainty Quantification AI Lab)
work.summary: Ph.D. research in uncertainty quantification and probabilistic machine learning.

courses: DAAD Master Scholarship for academic performance and research potential
Merit-based scholarship for academic excellence (top 15% of students)

publications.name: Amortized Structured Stochastic Variational Inference for Gaussian Process Latent Variable Models
publications.summary: Authors: Maksym Tretiakov, Sarah Filippi, Vincent Fortuin, Ruth Misener, Ruby Sedgwick, James Odgers.

publications.name: PAC Bayes Bounds Evaluation Framework
publications.summary: Authors: Yauheni Mardan, Maksym Tretiakov, Alexander Immer, Vincent Fortuin.

publications.name: A new atlas to study embryonic cell types in Xenopus
